ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Erisa rules her court with racket in hand and a readiness for the next match. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Wish, Set, Match Quest Pack.</>

<text color="F37EFDFF" fontface="black" size="16" Case="AllCaps">Cosmetic Styles: All cosmetics include shader selection style options.</>

<text color="F37EFDFF">Includes:</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Erisa rules her court with racket in hand and a readiness for the next match. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Wish, Set, Match Quest Pack.</>

<text color="F37EFDFF" fontface="black" size="16" Case="AllCaps">Cosmetic Styles: All cosmetics include shader selection style options.</>

<text color="F37EFDFF">Includes:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: <text color="F37EFDFF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: <text color="F37EFDFF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>
